name: Corazo
description_short: Corazo Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Imperial County, California with auto loans, home loans, credit cards, and deposit accounts.
description_long:
Corazo Credit Union (formerly First Imperial Credit Union) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union based in El Centro, California, serving residents of Imperial County with multiple branch locations. The institution operates under NCUA insurance and maintains a routing number 322276305, providing members with traditional credit union services and modern digital banking options.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans (new, used, and first-time buyer programs), home loans, VISA Platinum credit cards, checking and savings accounts, certificates of accounts, and IRA retirement accounts. Members can access these services through five physical branch locations in El Centro, Brawley, Calexico, Imperial, and La Quinta, as well as through online banking and a mobile banking app that supports check mobile deposit, bill payment, money transfer, and ATM/branch locator functionality.

Corazo distinguishes itself through active community involvement, as evidenced by recent donations to local organizations like the Calexico Education Foundation and Reps 4 Vets, plus participation in community events such as the Kiwanis Annual Mystery Box Cook-Off Challenge. The institution emphasizes member security with fraud alerts and maintains accessibility through toll-free support (1-877-352-1540) and multiple convenient branch locations across the Imperial Valley region.

As a credit union, Corazo provides member-owned structure and NCUA insurance protections rather than traditional bank FDIC insurance. The institution's service area is geographically limited to Imperial County, California, which may restrict membership eligibility. While loan rates are advertised (ranging from 4.99% APR for new auto loans to 9.99% APR for credit cards), the website does not provide detailed product comparison, fee structures, or minimum deposit requirements that would enable comprehensive evaluation against competitors.
services: First-time auto buyer loans at 9.24% APR
VISA Platinum credit cards at 9.99% APR
Mobile banking app with check deposit, bill pay, and money transfer
Loan payment portal accepting external bank accounts and debit cards
pros: Five physical branch locations throughout Imperial County California with extended service area coverage
Mobile banking app with check mobile deposit, bill pay, money transfer, and ATM locator functionality
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.99% APR for new vehicles and 5.24% APR for used vehicles
Multiple account types including checking, savings, certificates of account, and IRA retirement accounts
Active community engagement with documented donations and local event participation
NCUA insurance protection on deposits as a federally-insured credit union
Flexible loan payment options including text messaging, online portal, and mobile banking
cons: Geographic service limitation to Imperial County, California restricts membership eligibility
Website lacks transparent fee schedules, minimum deposit requirements, and detailed product terms
First-time auto buyer rates at 9.24% APR are significantly higher than rates for established borrowers
Limited information on credit card benefits, rewards programs, or cardholder protections beyond rate disclosure
No apparent online account opening process clearly described; appointment or branch visit may be required
best_for: Imperial County residents seeking locally-based credit union membership with branch convenience
Auto buyers (new, used, or first-time) comparing competitive rates with community-focused lending
Consumers prioritizing NCUA insurance and member-owned cooperative financial structure
Local residents seeking community-engaged financial institution with demonstrated local philanthropy
diagnosis: Corazo Credit Union is best for Imperial County, California residents who value local branch access, community engagement, and member-owned cooperative structure. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation to Imperial County membership eligibility and lack of transparent fee/term disclosures on the website.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Corazo — Credit Union in El Centro, CA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Corazo — NCUA-insured credit union in El Centro, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
